titleStmt.title: SII 31.68: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 68. (A.R. No. B 256 of 1938.) PANDIḶḶAPALLE, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Veṅkaṭēśvara svāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1447, Sarvvadhāri, Kārtika, ba. 7, Tuesday, corresponding to November 7, 1525 A.D. The Cyclic year is Pārthiva.

Records the grant of land measuring one kha situated on the northern side of the temple of Chemnarāya, and a land of kha 4, at the western side of Suliyavāni (?) land, and a garden to pipers (dōḷa nāgasarālavāru) and to Vōbuḷadāsari for their services rendered in the temple of Kēśavarāya, for the merit of the king and Rāyasam Ayyaparusayya by Komaragirināyani Rangappanāyaka. Pandiḷapalli is said to have been given as an amara village to the donor situated in Ghanḍikōṭa sīma. This sīma had been granted as nāyaṁkara to Rayasam Ayyaparusayya by Śrī Kṛishṇadēvarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhbhu(bhya)daya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1447
Agunēṭī sarvadhāri saṁvatsara kārttika
ba 7 ma śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēva mahārā
yalu pridhivī sāmājyaṁ śēyucuṁ
rāyasaṁ Ayyaparusayyavāri nāyaṁkrāna
kupāliṁci yicina ghaṁḍikōṭasīma
nu rāyasaṁ Ayyaparusayyavāru
komarigiri nāyani raṁgappanāyani gā
riki Amarānaku pāliṁcci yiccina
paṁdiḷlapallinu raṁgappagāru rāyala
kunu rayasaṁ Aṁyyaparusakunnu pu
ṇyaṁgānu kēśavarāyaniki vūḍiga śē(cē)śē
ḍōḷa nāgasarāla vāriki cēnu ceṁna
rāyaniguḍiki vuttaraṁ rāḷacēnu kha . 1
vūriki paḍumara suliya vāni pā
ṭistaḷaṁ ce(bī)nu Ö4 veraśi cēnu . 0

tōṭanuda rēvukāḍa tōṭa Ö .
vubhayatōṭa saha kha . 0 . [Ī]ḍō
jutiṁmōjuku ḍōḷanāgasārā
la vūḍigeṁ śēceśe(sē) Aṁdku mānya kha . 0 .
perumāḷa saṁrkitanaparuḍu vō
buḷadāsariki mānya perumāḷa mā
nyapucēniki tūrpu Ö ... siduni vaṁca
staḷaṁ Ö1 . vubhaya Ö2 yi (yī) puṇya(ṇyā)naku ya
vvaru ganaka tappinānu gaṁgga karuta gōbrā
hmaṇavadha śē(cē)śi(si)na pāpāna bōvuvāru .
śrī(srī)hatya sisu(śiśu)hatya śēsi(cēsi)na pāpāna bōvu
vāraṁ . svadatā(tta) dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpa harē
ṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu .
Digital edition of SII 31.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
